description: Timeline-based door opening animation with rotation and door creak SFX.

tracks.description: Door rotation 0 to 90 degrees (Y-axis) over 1 second

_note: Door opening sequence. Plays rotation animation from 0 to 90 degrees Y-axis with synchronized creak sound. Call playableDirector.Play() to execute. Assign door GameObject as AnimationTrack binding and audio source as AudioTrack binding.
